meaning: adj.[生]活体的 发生于活体内的 作用于活体的
examples: Intravital microscopy and fluorescent staining assessed capillary perfusion, cell damage, and inflammatory activation within extensor digitorum longus muscle.
Objective:To introduce the significance of the body temperature keeping pad in intravital microscopy on rat mesentery. Methods:The pad was made in our laboratory.
Through this project, we contribute to research and development for product formulations where intravital function-related components can be used most effectively.
